title: Member Spotlights: Three Months In
description: Recurring social-proof series highlighting Hive members at the 3-month mark. Builds community-trust signal without sounding like testimonial fluff. Photo-led on IG, reflection-led on LinkedIn.
hook: Three months in — here's what changed first.

cta.text: Read the full story in comments

keyMessage: Real members, real progress — without the before/after gimmickry
angle: Lead with what surprised them, not what changed visually
